$comment: Channel config for inbound report discovery (P079 / ADR-062). Read by /wr-itil:review-problems Step 8.5. Adopters edit channels[] to suit their tracker setup. ttl_seconds controls cache freshness; --force-upstream-recheck flag bypasses.

channels.$filter-note: label filter removed 2026-05-15 — repo has no `problem-report` label configured AND `problem-report.yml`'s auto-applied `[problem, needs-triage]` labels also don't exist in the repo, so every open inbound report from the template currently carries zero labels. Title prefix `[problem]` (set by `problem-report.yml` line 3) is the reliable signal. The JTBD-alignment + dual-axis-risk classifiers in Step 4.5e are the de-facto filters; label was redundant defense. Captured as a separate P-ticket: missing-labels-and-channels-config-drift.
